methodsAttempted.query: site:poliba.it Politecnico di Bari (ChatGPT OR "intelligenza artificiale" OR "IA generativa" OR "generative AI" OR "artificial intelligence") (policy OR linee guida OR regolamento OR studenti OR esami OR privacy OR didattica)
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official Poliba pages, including AI research/news, degree pages, privacy/cookie content, and a stale Academic Senate PDF result.

methodsAttempted.query: site:poliba.it "ChatGPT" OR "IA generativa" OR "intelligenza artificiale generativa" "Politecnico di Bari"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found mostly IRIS research catalog records, research/news pages, course material, and one Academic Senate PDF result later found inaccessible at the live URL.

methodsAttempted.query: site:poliba.it/it ("ZoE" OR "assistente virtuale" OR "AI agent" OR "intelligenza artificiale") (privacy OR dati OR studenti OR servizi) "Politecnico di Bari"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search identified the official ZoE page as the most policy-specific public AI service source, with service limitations, RAG behavior, and personal-data language.
Robots.txt was fetched from the official domain. The used /it/zoe and /it/lintelligenza-artificiale... paths were not disallowed; search/login/comment paths were not crawled.

methodsAttempted.query: English Firecrawl result normalized to Italian canonical URL
methodsAttempted.notes: The English path for the AI-bias article returned 404, while the Italian canonical path returned 200.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a substantive Politecnico di Bari ZoE page describing an experimental AI assistant, its limitations, information-retrieval method, and GDPR/session handling. A potentially relevant Academic Senate PDF was stale or inaccessible at fetch time, and an official AI-bias article was research/news context rather than a binding university policy source.

artifacts.queryUsed: site:poliba.it/it ("ZoE" OR "assistente virtuale" OR "AI agent" OR "intelligenza artificiale") (privacy OR dati OR studenti OR servizi) "Politecnico di Bari"
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official Politecnico di Bari page describing ZoE as an experimental AI-based virtual assistant and stating service limitations, RAG behavior, source selection, GDPR/session handling, and absence of automated legal-effect decisions.
Firecrawl and direct HTTP fetch both returned a 404 page rather than a PDF at the discovered URL, so the result was not used as evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: L'Intelligenza artificiale, se non governata, rischia discriminazioni nella selezione del personale
artifacts.queryUsed: site:poliba.it Politecnico di Bari (ChatGPT OR "intelligenza artificiale" OR "IA generativa" OR "generative AI" OR "artificial intelligence") (policy OR linee guida OR regolamento OR studenti OR esami OR privacy OR didattica)
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official Poliba article was accessible and AI-relevant, but it reports research/news context about AI bias in personnel recruitment rather than student, teaching, assessment, privacy, or institutional AI-use policy.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Firecrawl search snippet mentioned Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa and ChatGPT licenses, but live direct fetch and Firecrawl scrape returned Page not found.
artifacts.notes: The candidate was not used for claims because the official URL did not return the PDF content.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: È stato presentato a Roma ... uno studio curato dal Politecnico di Bari e dall'Università della Calabria dedicato all'Intelligenza Artificiale applicata al reclutamento del personale.
artifacts.notes: The article is official and AI-relevant, but claims in this staged run use the direct ZoE institutional service page instead.

stopConditions: Stop after collecting direct official evidence for AI-service treatment, generated-response limitations, RAG/source handling, and personal-data limitations.
Do not infer student or teaching generative-AI rules from stale, inaccessible, research-only, or news-only sources.

artifacts.errorReason: The discovered official PDF URL returned a Drupal Page not found response rather than the PDF content.

artifacts.claimText: Politecnico di Bari describes ZoE as an experimental university virtual assistant based on artificial-intelligence techniques for orientation and access to institutional information, including multilingual contexts.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: ZoE è un servizio sperimentale del Politecnico di Bari, basato su tecniche di intelligenza artificiale, pensato per supportare in particolare l'orientamento dei nuovi studenti e facilitare l'accesso a informazioni istituzionali distribuite tra portali, documenti e servizi dell'ateneo, anche in contesti multilingue.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: ZoE is an experimental Politecnico di Bari service based on AI techniques, intended to support new-student orientation and access to institutional information across university portals, documents, and services, including multilingual contexts.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: ZoE page, Assistente Virtuale di Ateneo section

artifacts.claimText: Politecnico di Bari states that ZoE responses are only informational and orientational, have no administrative value, are not official acts of the university, and do not replace regulations, notices, deliberations, institutional communications, or guidance from competent offices.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Le risposte generate da ZoE hanno esclusivamente finalità di supporto informativo e orientativo, non hanno valore amministrativo, non costituiscono atto ufficiale del Politecnico di Bari e non sostituiscono in alcun modo regolamenti, bandi, avvisi, deliberazioni, comunicazioni istituzionali o indicazioni fornite dalle strutture competenti.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: ZoE-generated responses are only for informational and orientation support, have no administrative value, are not official acts of Politecnico di Bari, and do not replace regulations, notices, decisions, institutional communications, or guidance from competent offices.

artifacts.claimText: Politecnico di Bari states that ZoE uses retrieval-augmented generation to select and retrieve information from indexed official documents, institutional databases, directories, and website content, and can indicate when adequate information is unavailable.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: ZoE elabora le risposte consultando contenuti e fonti informative dell'ateneo. Il sistema adotta una tecnica di recupero delle informazioni comunemente nota come RAG - Retrieval-Augmented Generation ... In base alla richiesta, ZoE seleziona la fonte più adatta tra documenti ufficiali indicizzati, basi dati istituzionali, rubriche e contenuti del sito web.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: ZoE processes responses by consulting university content and information sources, uses RAG, and selects the most suitable source among indexed official documents, institutional databases, directories, and website content.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: ZoE page, Tecnologia and Come viene elaborata una richiesta sections

artifacts.claimText: Politecnico di Bari states that ZoE conversations are not directly associated with the user's personal identity, are managed with a technical session identifier, may be retained anonymously for technical monitoring and improvement, and do not involve automated decisions with legal effects.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Le conversazioni non vengono associate direttamente all'identità personale dell'utente, ma gestite mediante un identificativo tecnico di sessione. Le conversazioni possono essere conservate in forma anonima, tramite session-id, esclusivamente per finalità di monitoraggio tecnico, analisi delle criticità e miglioramento progressivo del servizio. L'utilizzo del servizio non comporta l'adozione di decisioni automatizzate aventi effetti giuridici nei confronti dell'utente.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Conversations are not directly associated with the user's personal identity, are managed by a technical session identifier, may be retained anonymously for technical monitoring and service improvement, and use of the service does not involve automated decisions with legal effects.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: ZoE page, Privacy e Dati section

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow AI-service treatment claim directly supported by the official ZoE page.
Approved as a source-status limitation claim; it does not infer broader student or teaching AI policy.
Approved as an AI-service operation claim grounded in the official RAG/source-selection description.
Approved as a privacy/data-handling claim directly supported by the official Privacy e Dati section.

artifacts.title: Politecnico di Bari staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence is limited to Politecnico di Bari's official ZoE page. The page supports narrow claims about an experimental AI assistant, generated-response limitations, RAG over institutional sources, and session/GDPR/no-automated-decision handling. No binding student or teaching generative-AI rule was inferred from stale or research-only sources.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims do not establish a university-wide student, assessment, or teaching generative-AI policy because the accessible official evidence reviewed here did not state one.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
